posts.author: eazyBI (eazyBI Reports & Dashboards)
posts.cookedHtml:
Date & Time: 2023-12-20T15:00:00Z
Dec 20, 2023, 03:00 PM UTC (10:00 AM EST / 07:00 AM PST)
Register for eazyBI for monday.com Webinar (FREE)

Join us for a quick discovery webinar on eazyBI for monday .com. Get an overview of our features and functionalities to bring your data to life. We’ll start with an overview of eazyBI’s capabilities, and wrap up with a Q&A segment where you can ask all your burning questions.

What you’ll learn:

  • How to create powerful reports and charts easily
  • How to build functional dashboards for your teams
  • Navigate practical use cases with demo accounts
  • Engage in live Q&A sessions with eazyBI experts

About Reports and Charts for monday .com

eazyBI is a proud monday .com marketplace partner, providing a fully integrated data analytics, visualization, and business intelligence app. Integrated seamlessly into monday .com, eazyBI empowers monday .com users with advanced unlimited custom reporting and charting capabilities - all without switching apps.

monday.com-dashboard1974×1512 386 KB

eazyBI allows you to build unlimited custom reports, charts, and dashboards. Create unlimited eazyBI reporting accounts for each project, team, or department, or get a high-level overview across all your workspaces, boards, groups, and items.

Whether you’re managing complex projects, tracking sales pipelines, or analyzing marketing campaigns, eazyBI adapts to any reporting needs wiht up-to-date automated reporting. Use unlimited report and dashboard widgets to publish reports in monday .com boards, or share your reports outside monday .com via dashboard email subscriptions or public access links.

eazyBI Reports and Charts for monday.com is available on monday .com marketplace and can be set-up in just a few clicks. There are no specific dependencies, but for the best experience, we recommend using eazyBI with a monday .com account that has access to the necessary data for reporting.

eazyBI offers a free, fully functional 14-day trial, as well as paid plans for automated reporting.

Remember, the webinar is 2023-12-20T15:00:00Z
Don’t miss out on this chance to step up your data game with eazyBI.
Register for eazyBI for monday.com Webinar (FREE)
